mapper.select: SELECT r.id id, r.gmt_create gmtCreate, r.gmt_modified gmtmodified, r.`name` `name`, r.url url, r.description description, r.category_id categoryId FROM power_role_resource_relation rrr LEFT JOIN power_resource r ON rrr.resource_id = r.id WHERE rrr.role_id = #{roleId} AND r.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.id
